sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61179" key="*kw|ako/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κῳᾰκός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n61179.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of Cos</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Κῳακαὶ προγνώσιες</foreign> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αἱ Κῳακαί</foreign>, title of work by Hippocrates of Cos.</sense> </entryFree>
